name: Icaza's Study
description:
You are in a small room.  A large bed is in the corner, and a wooden rocker
creaks of it's own will on the hardwood floors.  You can see a stuffed ducky
and a stuffed piggie on the bed.  This bed looks like it's for display use
only, as the owner of this room must sleep somewhere else.  You can hear the
ringing of a small bell in the background.  The exit is to the north.
